rule_hits.summary: Lists references cited in the paper, covering various works on extending LLM context, efficient training methods, and related transformer architectures.
This paper introduces Activation Beacon, a method to extend the context window of LLMs by condensing raw activations into compact forms. It supports different context lengths wi...
The introduction discusses the limitations of LLMs in handling long contexts and presents Activation Beacon as a solution. It condenses LLM activations to allow perception of lo...
